Chimanga camp (Chimanga camp ; includes Nyakanenqe) Chimanga camp is located 70 km from Bukavu on land belonging to Pharmakina, a company which produces quinine. The road to the camp is dirt, and there is a bridge which is presently under repair, so that the trip takes at least 2 hours (2 and a half because of the bridge). Passage will be very difficult during the rainy season. There is no village close to the camp. The closest water supply is a small spring about 1 km away. Latrines have been built by the refugees. The camp is organized into 2 parts occupying 2 adjacent hills (Chimanga and Nyakanenge.)
